Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class AbstractCheck<SELF extends AbstractCheck<SELF,ACTUAL>,ACTUAL>

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<SELF,ACTUAL>
Type Parameters:
SELF - the concrete check type (for fluent chaining)
ACTUAL - the type of the value under test
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<SELF,ACTUAL>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ArrayCheck, BooleanCheck, ByteArrayCheck, CollectionCheck, CsvCheck, DoubleArrayCheck, EnumCheck, ExecutionCheck, FileCheck, FutureCheck, InputStreamCheck, IntArrayCheck, IterableCheck, JsonCheck, LongArrayCheck, MapCheck, MatchResultCheck, MultilineCheck, ObjectCheck, OptionalCheck, OrderedCheck, SealedClassCheck, SnapshotCheck, StreamCheck, StringCheck, ThrowableCheck, UriCheck, UuidCheck, XmlCheck, YamlCheck
public abstract class AbstractCheck<SELF extends AbstractCheck<SELF,ACTUAL>,ACTUAL> extends Object implements Check<SELF,ACTUAL>
Base class for built-in check types. Handles self-type resolution and stores the actual value + failure handler.

    • isActualPresent

      protected final boolean isActualPresent()
      Returns true if actual is non-null. If null, records a structured failure via the failure handler and returns false. Leaf check methods that dereference actual() should guard with: 
      if (!isActualPresent()) return self();
